a b : ℝ
hab : a < b

hfint : ∀ (n : ℕ), HasIntegral (f n) a b (ℓ n)
hfF : UnifConv f F
RSdiff : ∀ ε > 0, ∃ N, ∀ n ≥ N, ∀ (M : ℕ), |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε

N : ℕ

m : ℕ

M : ℕ := M1 + M2

hM2 : |(fun N => RiemannSum (f m) a b N) M - ℓ m| < ε / 4

        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +

proof: linarith [abs_sub_le (ℓ m) (RiemannSum (f m) a b M) (ℓ n), abs_sub_le (RiemannSum (f m) a b M) (RiemannSum F a b M) (ℓ n), abs_sub_le (RiemannSum F a b M) (RiemannSum (f n) a b M) (ℓ n), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum (f n) a b M) (RiemannSum F a b M), abs_sub_comm (ℓ m) (RiemannSum (f m) a b M)]

        apply add_le_add_right
        apply abs_add_le
      _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m) (RiemannSum (f m) a b M), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M) (RiemannSum (f n) a b M)]
        ring

linarith [abs_sub_le (ℓ m) (RiemannSum (f m) a b M) (ℓ n),
              abs_sub_le (RiemannSum (f m) a b M) (RiemannSum F a b M) (ℓ n),
              abs_sub_le (RiemannSum F a b M) (RiemannSum (f n) a b M) (ℓ n),
              abs_sub_comm (ℓ m) (RiemannSum (f m) a b M),
              abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M) (RiemannSum (f n) a b M)]

linarith [abs_sub_le (ℓ m) (RiemannSum (f m) a b M) (ℓ n), abs_sub_le (RiemannSum (f m) a b M) (RiemannSum F a b M) (ℓ n), abs_sub_le (RiemannSum F a b M) (RiemannSum (f n) a b M) (ℓ n), abs_sub_comm (ℓ m) (RiemannSum (f m) a b M), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M) (RiemannSum (f n) a b M)]
